userdoc.notice: The SuperchainConfig contract is used to manage configuration of global superchain values.

devdoc.details: WARNING: When upgrading this contract, any active pause states will be lost as the pause state      is stored in storage variables that are not preserved during upgrades. Therefore, this contract      should not be upgraded while the system is paused.

returns._0: The timestamp when the pause expires, or 0 if not paused.

params._guardian: Address of the guardian, can pause the OptimismPortal.

returns._0: True if the system can be paused for this identifier.

params._identifier: The address identifier for the pause.

returns._0: The duration after which a pause expires.
True if the global superchain system is paused.
True if the system is paused for this identifier and not expired.

         seconds. Any duration longer than this value is incompatible with Stage 1.
